text:
Created attachment 144452
Patch file, in 'diff -ruN' format

This patch aught to solve the issue.

Not considered urgent. (Finch will auto patch in meantime, until next official qjail release).


Also included:
-ge 92 compatibility fix for Finch users on FreeNAS and NAS4Free. Who are still on FreeBSD 9.2. (they still can't upgrade yet). Without that will causes some Finch users problems / qjail installation error.
